type DriverId inherits String
type PeriodStart inherits Instant
type PeriodEnd inherits Instant
type GrossAmount inherits Decimal
type NetAmount inherits Decimal
model Payout {
  id : DriverId
  periodStart : PeriodStart
  periodEnd : PeriodEnd
  gross : GrossAmount
  net : NetAmount
}
service PayoutService {
  operation computePayout(driverId : DriverId, periodStart : PeriodStart, periodEnd : PeriodEnd) : Payout
  operation listPastPayouts(driverId : DriverId) : Payout[]
}
find { Payout } as { id, periodStart, periodEnd, gross, net }

type TrialId inherits String
type CohortId inherits String
type EnrolmentId inherits String
type PatientId inherits String
type EventId inherits String
model Trial {
  id : TrialId
  name : String
}
model Cohort {
  id : CohortId
  trialId : TrialId
  name : String
}
model Enrolment {
  id : EnrolmentId
  patientId : PatientId
  cohortId : CohortId
  dateEnrolled : Date
}
model TrialEvent {
  id : EventId
  trialId : TrialId
  cohortId : CohortId
  patientId : PatientId
  eventType : String
  description : String
  timestamp : Instant
}
service TrialService {
  operation createTrial(trial : Trial) : TrialId
  operation enrolPatient(patientId : PatientId, cohortId : CohortId) : EnrolmentId
  operation recordEvent(event : TrialEvent) : EventId
  operation findEvents(trialId : TrialId?, cohortId : CohortId?, patientId : PatientId?) : TrialEvent[]
}
